title: Those who're dating a foreigner,do your gfs learn Cantonese?

replies.msg:
I know Cantonese is a language very difficult to learn
But I think if she really likes you,
she should naturally have a motivation to learn your background and language,
ain't it?
I am not asking her to learn until she speaks fluently,
I'm just think she should be more interested, at least to learn how to say some basic stuffs......

What are your 2 cents?

咁我喺呢度講返句sor先，唔係好知你係真心定假膠，都幫一幫你

有錯請指導

Not necessarily, some people are very into culture shit and some people don’t. Being in love with you doesn’t mean that she has to be in love with your culture. Although from my experience they at least showed interest by pretending they’re learning some words and alway ended up forgetting it. What I’m trying to say is that it’s not healthy to have too much expectations for your another half, it’s more about being grateful and appreciating the another half
